description: The project 'world_survey.gpkg' contains a layer named 'highway_segments' with a single feature: 'Trans-African Hwy 2'. Currently, it is a straight line connecting Lagos, Nigeria to Algiers, Algeria. Modify the geometry of this line to pass through Niamey, Niger (approximate coordinates: 13.51°N, 2.11°E). You may use the 'Niamey' marker in the 'world_capitals' layer for alignment. Save the changes to the 'highway_segments' layer.
